postSubmissionChangeNote: Reserve allocation changed after the original 2026-05-09 BaseScan submission; use these values for any follow-up correction.
ownerReserveCustodyNote: The 600,000,000 GCA reserve is held in a normal owner-controlled wallet. It is not a lock, vesting contract, or multisig.
description: GCA is a fixed-supply ERC-20 token deployed on Base Mainnet. GCA currently stands for Go China Access, a concept-stage community direction focused on the Go China macro narrative, bilingual Web3 education, public market research, and planned access to non-custodial quant risk tools. The intended Web3 Radar bridge is an access and membership layer for reports, risk-warning credits, backtests, ENTRY_READY signal review, position-size calculators, subscription discounts, and risk-control training. The contract creates 1,000,000,000 GCA at deployment and includes no post-deployment minting, burning, taxes, blacklist, or admin controls.
officialEmailNote: Owner-provided Gmail address for BaseScan submission.
socialLinkNote: Official Telegram was created after the initial BaseScan submission; include it in any BaseScan follow-up or future token profile correction.
